attribute_descriptions.image_quality_score: Image quality on a scale of 1-10 as rated by independent reviewers
attribute_descriptions.battery_life_hours: Battery life in hours of continuous shooting
attribute_descriptions.optical_zoom_x: Optical zoom level (e.g., 10x means 10 times optical magnification)
attribute_descriptions.ease_of_use_score: Ease of use on a scale of 1-10 based on user testing with first-time camera buyers
attribute_descriptions.has_manual_controls: Whether the camera has full manual controls (aperture, shutter speed, ISO) — Yes or No
attribute_descriptions.raw_format_support: Whether the camera can save photos in RAW format for post-processing — Yes or No
attribute_descriptions.burst_speed_fps: Continuous burst shooting speed in frames per second
attribute_descriptions.weather_sealed: Whether the camera body is sealed against dust and moisture — Yes or No
attribute_descriptions.video_resolution_4k: Whether the camera can record video in 4K resolution — Yes or No
